pages.text: $(l)Gaia's Wrath$() — the ultimate Botanical spell. Channels the devastating power of the Gaia Guardian in a massive AoE attack.$(br2)$(l)Max Level:$() 10$(br)$(l)Type:$() Legendary AoE$(br)$(l)Cooldown:$() 180 seconds$(br)$(l)Botania Mana Cost:$() 150,000 + 50,000/level$(br2)Applies Wither and Weakness to all enemies in range. Reaches full power only in the Alfheim dimension. This spell requires endgame resources to craft.
